name: 15Five Performance Management API
what_it_does: 15Five REST API for continuous performance management platform. Enables AI agents to query weekly check-ins, OKR progress, engagement survey results, and manager-employee 1:1 data. 15Five combines performance reviews, weekly check-ins, and OKRs in a lightweight weekly workflow approach popular with mid-market SaaS companies.
use_cases: Querying weekly check-in responses and engagement signals from HR analytics agents
Retrieving OKR status and progress updates from goal tracking agents
Accessing performance review data and manager feedback from HRBP agents
Integrating employee sentiment signals into retention risk models from people analytics agents
not_for: Payroll, benefits, or HR record keeping (15Five is performance focused)
Large enterprise with complex competency frameworks (15Five is simpler than Workday)
best_when: A mid-market company using 15Five wants AI agents to aggregate weekly check-in sentiment, track OKR momentum, and surface manager-employee engagement signals into HRBP workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Weekly check-in responses and performance data are sensitive employee communications. Individual-level data requires strict access controls.

auth.notes: 15Five API key authentication. Keys generated in admin settings. Account-admin level access for agent integration.

pricing.notes: Per-user pricing. Competitive with other performance management tools.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Weekly check-in responses and performance data are sensitive employee communications
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API documentation is limited — contact 15Five support for detailed API reference
Admin-level API key gives broad access — use minimum necessary permissions
Rate limits undocumented — throttle for bulk people data queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee weekly check-ins, OKR data, and performance feedback. SOC2, GDPR. API key admin-level access requires careful handling.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee performance and check-in data is sensitive. SOC2, GDPR. Admin API key must be secured.
